finding_dispositions.action: Replaced 'property rights' with 'economic security' on line 118. Article 11 provides positive entitlements (housing, food, clothing) — distinct from the negative-liberty 'property rights' framing conservatives typically use. Good catch on the positive/negative liberty gap.
Added 'Research suggests' prefix to voter lens text on line 12. The CMF-cited hedging on line 100 already modeled the right approach — the lens panel now matches.

Replaced 'mirrors' with 'echoes' on line 76. ADA (domestic, simple majority) and ICESCR ratification (treaty, 2/3 Senate) share outcome patterns but differ structurally — 'echoes' conveys similarity without implying equivalence.

payload.prior_scan_note: Scan-007 → scan-008 cycle healthy. All 4 prior findings addressed, 3 new findings found and fixed same-session. Fair-witness dimension continues to surface real improvements on advocacy pages.

claims.text: All 3 findings from scan-008 accepted and fixed in src/pages/action/index.astro
